ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "team1" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the team that won the toss */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., normal, abandoned) */,
  "dl_applied" INTEGER /* Whether Duckworth-Lewis method was applied */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "win_by_runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs by which the winner won */,
  "win_by_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets by which the winner won */,
  "player_of_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "umpire3" TEXT /* Name of the third umpire (if applicable) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "neutral_venue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match was played at a neutral venue */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match (e.g., 5 days for Test matches) */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Total number of overs played in the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "man_of_the_series" TEXT /* Player of the series (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player_of_match FOREIGN KEY ("player_of_match") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1 FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1 FOREIGN KEY ("team1") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2 FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2 FOREIGN KEY ("team2") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_home_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "player_batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "player_bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm orthodox) */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_joined_team" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "player_caps" INTEGER /* Number of caps (appearances) for the player */,
  "player_total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "player_total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "player_awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "umpire_country" TEXT /* Country of the umpire */,
  "umpire_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "umpire_matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Total number of matches officiated */,
  "umpire_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the umpire (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)
column_names: Season in which the match was played

Date when the match was played
Decision made by the team that won the toss

Number of runs by which the winner won

Format of the match (e.g., international, domestic)

Duration of the match (e.g., 5 days for Test matches)
Total number of overs played in the match
Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed)
Number of spectators at the match
